name: @tamb/gamegrid-demo
description: Parcel demo consuming the sibling @tamb/gamegrid package

scripts.start: node prerun/cleanup.js && npm install && node prerun/compile.js && npx parcel src/output.html --no-cache --dist-dir dist --open
scripts.start:parcel: node prerun/compile.js && npx parcel src/output.html --no-cache --dist-dir dist --open
